The three Saracens immediately became the sun never saw me eating, I am the hired servant on the estate of possessed of demons. They drew their swords and cut each other to a rich man who is unjust and greedy. I was with him for fifteen picces. I took the young man to my cave and he no longer wished years, toiling night and day, and he would not pay me my wages, to leave me. He renounced the world—and after completing seven bul treated me with considerable harshness. 1 said to myself: years in the monastic life, went to his rest. He was from Tyre.

“Theodore, if you endure this man, he is going to obtain the kingdom of heaven for you instead of the wages he owes you", So 156. THE REPLY OF AN ELDER I kept my body free of contact with women until this day.” When TO TWO PHILOSOPHERS we heard this, we were greatly edified.

Two philosophers came to an elder and asked bim to say something beneficial to them. The elder remained silent. Again the philosophers spoke: ‘Will you not answer us, father? The elder said to them: ‘That you are skilled in the use of words <philologor>1 am

How long will you cultivate the art of CALLED MARDES speech, you who have no understanding of whal it is to speak? Let the object of your philosophy be always to contemplate death, There is a mountain by the Dead Sea called Mardes® and it is very possessing yourselves ip silencs and tranquillity." | high.
